authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: 14 CCR §7.50(b)(46) — El Estero Lake (Monterey Co.)
sources.quotedText: (46) El Estero Lake (Monterey Co.) portions of the lake south of the Pearl Street bridge known as Camino Aquajito Arm and Camino El Estero finger. Closed to all fishing all year.

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (updated June 1, 2026)
City of Monterey — El Estero Park Complex
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon — CDFW
sources.quotedText: R4 Monterey El Estero Lake Rainbow Trout Catchable Put and Take January-April & December

parameters.note: Closure applies only to the portions of El Estero Lake south of the Pearl Street bridge known as the Camino Aquajito Arm and the Camino El Estero finger; the remainder of the lake is not covered by this entry.

regulations.humanSummary: The Camino Aquajito Arm and Camino El Estero finger, south of the Pearl Street bridge, are closed to all fishing year-round.
regulations.verbatimText: El Estero Lake (Monterey Co.) portions of the lake south of the Pearl Street bridge known as Camino Aquajito Arm and Camino El Estero finger. Closed to all fishing all year.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license (applies to any portions of the lake that remain open to fishing).

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

stockingSchedule.note: CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon lists El Estero Lake (Monterey Co.) for catchable-size Rainbow Trout under the Put and Take program, with a stated release month range of January-April & December (this entry covers the January-April window). Plans are provisional; execution is not guaranteed.

CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon lists El Estero Lake (Monterey Co.) for catchable-size Rainbow Trout under the Put and Take program, with a stated release month range of January-April & December (this entry covers the December window). Plans are provisional; execution is not guaranteed.
